voice.tone: Clear and editorial. Respects the reader's time.
voice.errors: Minimal and unobtrusive. A 404 should suggest similar articles. Search with no results should offer alternative queries.
voice.loading: Article card skeletons with headline and excerpt placeholders. Subtle fade-in for content blocks. Reading experience never shows spinners.
voice.empty_states: Editorially appropriate. An empty category should suggest related topics or popular articles to keep readers engaged.
